prompts.title: Not sure which glasses suit you?
prompts.description: Facial feature analysis + glasses matching guide
prompts.prompt:
Not sure what style of glasses suits you?

1. Facial Feature Analysis:
"Facial Feature Analysis". Place the portrait at the center. Automatically analyze the face (do not use fixed or pre-written labels). Detect and annotate the face shape, eyes, eyebrows, nose, cheeks, and lips. Add thin arrows pointing to each feature. For each feature, provide a short label (e.g. "soft oval face", "almond eyes") and 2–3 brief bullet points describing the actual feature based on the image. Use small rounded info cards with simple icons.

2. Glasses Matching Guide:
"Glasses Matching Guide". Using the uploaded portrait (with the facial features reproduced 100% faithfully) as the subject, generate a clean, modern infographic poster. The style should be minimalist, aesthetic, and visually driven, with clear typography, rounded cards, thin lines, subtle shadows, and a premium magazine feel. Title: "Glasses Matching Guide". Automatically analyze the face shape and proportions, then generate recommendations for suitable and unsuitable glasses. Show side-by-side glasses try-on comparisons using the same face.
prompts.author: YanAI

prompts.title: Not sure which hairstyle suits you?
prompts.prompt:
Not sure which hairstyle suits you?

Based on the user's uploaded front-facing portrait photo, generate a highly polished landscape 4:3 "AI Hairstyle Aesthetics Upgrade Report / Hairstyle Before & After Report". The user's uploaded photo is the core reference for this generation. Strictly preserve the user's identity likeness, facial structure, face shape proportions, apparent age, true skin contours, expression and temperament, and original outfit, so the person is instantly recognizable as the same individual. Focus the upgrade on hairstyle design, hair length, bangs treatment, layering, volume, graduated body, hair-end height, and hair color suggestions. Do not alter the facial features, do not slim the face, do not smooth or beautify the skin, do not change the clothing, and do not rely on makeup for improvement. Design the layout as a personal hairstyle upgrade report blending a "fashion hair consultant template + magazine-style fashion advisor template + multi-option comparison + a playful 'pitfalls to avoid' vibe". It should be professional, clear, and well-designed, with a slight touch of "so these hairstyles really don't suit me" humor that makes viewers smile — but no mockery, no making the subject look ugly, and no negative prank imagery.

[Overall Layout] Landscape 4:3 composition, with a background of mainly white, off-white, and light gray, plus small amounts of light olive green, gray-blue, and soft red as functional accent colors. Do not copy the reference layout exactly; use a coherent full-page matrix with a clearer hierarchy tailored to the individual. Structure: "large original look image on the left + large recommended look image on the right + best-choice recommendation area in the lower middle + pitfalls area at the bottom + hairstyle execution guide at the bottom". The overall visual should feel premium, keep sensible white space, and be information-rich without feeling crowded.

[Title Area] Main title at the top: AI Hairstyle Aesthetics Upgrade Report. Subtitle: Hairstyle Before & After Report. Optional small auxiliary tags: HAIR RESET STYLE PROPOSAL / BEST CUT FOR YOU / Personal Hairstyle Upgrade.

[Central Visual] Left: large Before image of the original hairstyle — keep the user's current hairstyle as true to life as possible, including the original length, natural hair volume, messiness, flatness against the scalp, bangs condition, hair-end condition, and overall energy. Do not secretly improve the original; do not make the "before" look already good. Right: large After image of the recommended hairstyle — still the same person, with the same face, same brightness, same clothing, and similar lighting and composition; only the hairstyle is upgraded. The new hairstyle should suit the person better — more refreshed, more attractive, more flattering to the face shape, more harmonious, with everyday premium appeal, and realistically achievable. Lean toward a natural Korean style, clean cut, effortless, low-maintenance, everyday look — no over-the-top punk spikes, no influencer template hairstyles, no excessive slicked-back looks, no obvious bleaching or dyeing, no stage looks.

[Recommended Hairstyle Optimization Directions] Automatically determine the most suitable hairstyle based on the person's actual features, and indicate the key improvements:
1. A more suitable bangs style or forehead exposure ratio
2. More natural crown volume
3. Better-controlled overall head volume
4. Cleaner hair ends and layering
5. More orderly visual hair density
6. A natural hair color better suited to the skin tone and temperament
7. More balanced head-to-face proportions and a more refreshed look

[Professional Annotations] Add refined numbered dots, thin arrows, and zoomed-in detail callouts on the main image, clearly marking these 6 key points:
01 Bangs: explain how the bangs, length, or forehead exposure flatters the features
02 Crown Volume: explain how crown volume boosts vitality
03 Side Balance: explain how side volume flatters the face width
04 Layers: explain how layering reduces heaviness
05 Hair Ends: explain how cleaner, sharper ends add order
06 Hair Color: explain how a natural hair color improves overall clarity

[Mid-Section Info Bar: Key Features] Place a concise info bar near the main image using icons + short labels — do not write long paragraphs. Automatically analyze and display the person's current hairstyle fundamentals, e.g.:
- Face Shape
- Hair Density
- Hair Texture
- Natural Wave
- Forehead Ratio
- Current Length
- Styling Difficulty

[Best Options Area] Show 4 recommended hairstyle option cards, keeping green check markers. Every option must be the same person, changing only the hairstyle — never the face shape or outfit. Each card shows one suitable hairstyle with a name and one advantage description. The recommended hairstyles should differ from each other but stay within a reasonable range — natural, realistic, and achievable. For example:
- Soft Layer Cut: light and natural, flatters the face shape
- Korean Clean Style: sharp and refreshed, everyday premium
- Side Part Natural: adds maturity, looks neater
- Airy Texture: more airiness, less heaviness
Each card should make viewers feel "this one works too, that one's also nice", creating a clear sense of comparison and choice.

[Less Flattering Area] Show 3 not-recommended hairstyle options, keeping red X markers. These should be instantly recognizable as slightly unsuitable, even a little funny, but keep it measured: no mockery, nothing absurd, never deliberately making the person ugly — only a "genuinely unsuitable" contrast. For example:
- Overly flat against the scalp: widens the face, looks cramped
- Overly thick blunt bangs: crowds the features, looks stuffy
- Excessive slicked-back style: looks aging and forced
- Too short or too sharp: too harsh, too severe, unbalanced
These unsuitable options should look mildly amusing yet remain within realistic hairstyle territory — do not turn them into exaggerated joke looks.

[Bottom Execution Guide] Add a practical hairstyle execution guide at the bottom, expressed clearly with sparse text:
1. Best hair length / recommended length
2. Trimming focus / styling priorities (bangs, sideburns, crown, ends, layers)
3. Styling method / daily routine (blow-dry, tousle for volume, light styling)
4. Maintenance Cycle / suggested upkeep interval
5. Best hair color / recommended colors
Show the recommended hair colors with 3–4 natural swatches, e.g.: natural black, dark brown, gray-brown, soft cool brown. Keep everything natural and low-key — no high-saturation bleach or dye.

[Text Style] Use mostly short labels, short headings, and short sentences across the image — no long explanatory paragraphs. The text must be legible with no garbled characters and no large amounts of meaningless filler text. The whole image should read like a "personal face-and-hairstyle demonstration" from a professional facial and hair consultant, with a light, classroom-style touch.

[Visual Tone] Give the whole image a professional consultant feel, with a hint of a "pitfall warning" report vibe. The recommendation area should make viewers think "these hairstyles really do suit them", and the pitfalls area should make them think "ha, that one really doesn't work" — yet the whole piece must stay clean, premium, attractive, and well-designed, never lowbrow mockery.

[Fine Print at Bottom] This image is an AI styling visual proposal for reference only. For actual styling decisions, consult a professional hairstylist in person.

[Strictly Avoid] Do not change the user's identity, do not swap faces, do not alter the facial features, do not smooth or beautify the skin, do not change the outfit, and do not improve the look through makeup or clothing. Do not generate exaggerated hairstyles, punk spikes, anime looks, stage looks, excessive slicked-back styles, or heavy bleaching. Do not let the different hairstyle options look like different people. Do not copy the reference image's layout exactly. Do not mimic generic hairstyle collage images — instead, create a highly polished, professional, and slightly playful personal hairstyle upgrade report.
prompts.author: YanAI

prompts.title: Natural Beauty Retouch
prompts.description: Preserve original features + light skin refinement
prompts.prompt:
Please apply a natural, realistic, light beauty retouch to the uploaded portrait photo. The goal is natural retouching as done by a professional photographer, not an obvious filter or face-swap effect.

Strictly preserve the same person's identity likeness, facial structure, face shape proportions, apparent age, hairstyle outline, expression, clothing, background, and original composition. Do not change the face shape, do not slim the face, do not alter the shape of the eyes, nose, or lips, and do not make the person look unlike themselves.

Focus areas:
1. Slightly even out the skin tone; reduce dullness, redness, and oily shine; remove only temporary blemishes, acne marks, caked makeup, and obvious patchiness.
2. Preserve real skin texture, pores, fine lines, and natural peach fuzz; avoid a plastic, waxy, or over-smoothed look.
3. Slightly brighten the eyes and key facial areas while keeping natural highlights and shadows — no exaggerated makeup effect.
4. Make the lips, eyebrows, eyelashes, and hair strands cleaner and more defined, but do not repaint the facial features or add heavy makeup.
5. Improve the overall white balance, exposure, contrast, and skin tone so the photo looks clearer, cleaner, and more natural.

Output: realistic photography, portrait retouching, natural skin texture, clean and fresh, high-definition detail, original features preserved. Strictly avoid: face swapping, distorted features, excessive beautification, generic influencer face, heavy skin smoothing, fake pores, over-sharpening, heavy HDR, grayish or orange skin tones.
prompts.author: YanAI

prompts.title: Random Portrait Style V1
prompts.prompt:
# Role Definition
You are a senior visual artist and photography-style prompt expert with a keen sense of contemporary mainstream aesthetics. You are skilled in photographic composition, lighting, mood building, and portrait aesthetics, and can turn complex visual concepts into precise, vivid, and appealing text descriptions specifically designed to guide AI image generation models.

# Task Specification
Your task is to randomly combine a set of preset, broadly appealing photography style elements and generate one high-quality, distinctly styled, eye-catching realistic portrait prompt for AI image generation.

# Task Steps
1.  **Randomly pick one core photography style** from the list below as the base style:
    * Fine-skin realistic texture style
    * Everyday candid snapshot style
    * High-end fashion portrait style
    * Japanese fresh-mood style
    * Cinematic light-and-shadow storytelling style
    * Dewy translucent portrait

2.  **Randomly determine the subject and composition**: randomly pick one subject, one camera angle, and one shot size:
    * **Subject**: young girl, young woman, couple
    * **Camera angle**: high angle, low angle, eye level, profile
    * **Shot size**: facial close-up, half-body portrait, full body

3.  **Randomly set the scene and lighting**: randomly pick one scene and one lighting type, making sure they pair sensibly:
    * **Scene**: sunny outdoors, clean minimalist interior, city street at night, by a cafe window, seaside, art gallery, behind misted glass
    * **Lighting**: soft natural sunlight, dramatic side light tracing the silhouette, a single spotlight in dim surroundings, shimmering light reflections off water, direct-flash snapshot feel

4.  **Randomly add mood and details**: randomly pick 2–3 details that enhance the frame's storytelling and dynamism:
    * **Mood/Expression**: naturally relaxed, gazing straight into the lens, aloof and alluring, gently lowered gaze, quiet melancholy
    * **Dynamic details**: hair stirred by a breeze, wet strands clinging to the cheek, fingers interacting with the environment/objects, motion blur or slight camera shake in the frame
    * **Texture/Effects**: film grain, lens noise, floating particles, water droplets or shimmer on the skin

5.  **Randomly choose an aspect ratio** from these common ratios:
    * 3:4
    * 4:3
    * 9:16
    * 16:9

6.  **Combine and polish**: organically merge the elements chosen above into one fluent, vivid, highly descriptive prompt. Make sure the language flows well and sparks creative inspiration.

7.  **Add the mandatory ending**: at the end of the generated prompt, you must append the fixed suffix word for word.

# Constraints
1.  The generated style must be a realistic portrait style that mainstream audiences readily accept; never generate anime, oil painting, cyberpunk, gothic, or other niche or non-photorealistic art styles.
2.  The content must be healthy and positive, containing nothing sensitive or inappropriate.
3.  The final output must be one complete prompt paragraph, not bullet points or sections.
4.  You must append at the end of the prompt: "[Do not change the facial proportions or appearance; preserve the person's original look. Original proportions! Original proportions! Original proportions!]". This is mandatory and must be included.
5.  Every generated prompt should be unique and random; avoid repetition.

# Response Format
Output only the final photography-style prompt text, without any extra preface, title, explanation, or notes.

# Examples and Guidance
* **High-quality example 1 (fine-texture style):** In a fine-skin realistic texture style, the frame shows a facial close-up of a young girl presented from a slightly high camera angle. The background creates a fresh, sunny scene; the girl's loose hair drifts in the breeze and her eyes sparkle with a sunny yet alluring mood, exuding cool elegance. The image emphasizes her facial details with carefully handled highlights, rendered with camera-noise texture and a translucent blue-white finish. Ratio 3:4. [Do not change the facial proportions or appearance; original proportions! Original proportions! Original proportions!]
* **High-quality example 2 (fashion portrait style):** Post-water fashion portrait, extreme facial close-up shot at very close range, eyes gazing straight into the lens, naturally relaxed expression, clear dewy makeup. The subject and several tiny tropical fish drifting slowly in the fish-tank foreground, their translucent tail fins lively and graceful. The water surface refracts shifting ripples of light, dappled glints dance across the face, and floating underwater particles surround the subject. The overall mood is dreamy and quiet, in dark brown-black tones with a strong premium feel, interlaced with floating defocus, motion blur, and fine film grain. Ratio 9:16. [Do not change the facial proportions or appearance; original proportions! Original proportions! Original proportions!]
* **High-quality example 3 (candid snapshot style):** It should look like a careless couple snapshot accidentally taken with an instant camera. The photo should have a slight shake, with the camera flash firing in the dark and its light diffusing across the whole photo. A boy and girl press their faces together intimately while looking at the lens, from a front-camera selfie perspective. The photo should not be too sharp and should have an instant-film texture. Ratio 4:3. [Do not change the facial proportions or appearance; original proportions! Original proportions! Original proportions!]
prompts.author: YanAI

prompts.title: Random Portrait Style V2
prompts.prompt:
# Role Definition
You are a top-tier commercial photographer and visual artist with sharp fashion insight and extensive portrait photography experience. You excel at capturing people's genuine emotions and states, creating visual work that satisfies mainstream aesthetics while remaining distinctive. You are a master of light, composition, color, and texture, able to turn abstract moods and emotions into concrete, actionable photography style descriptions.
# Task Specification
Your task is to randomly create a variety of unique, distinctive, and broadly appealing realistic portrait photography styles based on the user's needs. These style descriptions will serve as AI image prompts and must be detailed, specific, and richly pictorial, capable of guiding the AI to generate high-quality, eye-catching photographic work.
# Task Steps
Conceive the core scene/emotion (Core Scene/Emotion): First, randomly pick an everyday scene or a specific emotion as the foundation of the style. For example: "lazy morning by the window", "the detached feeling of a city night stroll", "a quiet summer afternoon", "a warm moment playing with a pet".
Set the photographic tone (Photographic Tone): Randomly choose one of the following mainstream photography types, or blend two, as the overall tone:
Japanese Fresh Style: characterized by high brightness, low saturation, soft light, and clean frames.
Candid Snapshot Style: mimics unposed captured moments, with slight motion blur, imperfect composition, and a genuine slice-of-life feel.
Fashion Editorial Style: emphasizes a premium feel, well-defined facial contours, refined makeup, and expressive poses and gazes.
Cinematic Style: uses distinctive lighting (e.g., Rembrandt light, neon light), environmental storytelling, and the subject's mood to create the atmosphere of a film still.
Design the light and color (Lighting & Color): randomly combine the light type, direction, and color scheme — this is the soul of the style.
Light types: soft diffused light, hard direct light, golden-hour evening light, light beams through blinds, reflections off water, etc.
Color schemes: an overall tonal bias (e.g., cool blue-white, warm orange-brown, a low-saturation Morandi palette) plus a decision on the level of contrast.
Set the composition and angle (Composition & Angle): randomly choose a compositional approach to highlight the subject.
Angle: frontal, profile, 45-degree, high angle, low angle.
Shot size: facial close-up, half-body, full body.
Composition: centered composition, rule of thirds, leading lines.
Describe texture and details (Texture & Details): add decisive details and textures that set the image apart.
Skin texture: delicate and translucent, lightly sweat-sheened, natural skin with freckles.
Environment/prop details: dust motes in the air, lens flare, details of damp hair strands, fabric wrinkles.
Post-processing texture: add subtle film grain, sharpening, or soft-focus effects.
Integrate and output: organically combine the randomly chosen elements above into one fluent, vivid, evocative text description. Keep the language concise with clear keywords so the AI can easily understand and execute it.
# Constraints
The generated style must be a "realistic portrait" style — avoid generating any form of anime, illustration, or 3D-rendered style.
The style must be fresh and aligned with mainstream aesthetics; avoid overly niche, bizarre, or overused fixed style templates (e.g., cyberpunk, gothic fantasy, steampunk).
Descriptions should focus on mood, lighting, texture, color, and composition rather than specific clothing or the person's identity.
The final output should be one complete piece of text, without step breakdowns or any extra explanatory text.
Each generated style should have its own memorable hook and avoid being highly similar to other styles.
# Response Format
Output only the final photography style description, wrapping the whole description in a code block.
# Examples and Guidance
Example 1 (Japanese fresh + candid snapshot):
Japanese airy candid style. In a room bathed in afternoon sunlight, use slightly overexposed settings to create a light, translucent mood. The subject faces sideways to the camera, gazing out the window, captured at the instant something catches their attention. Light filters through a sheer white curtain, casting soft patches of light on the face, with the hair edges glowing in golden rim light. The overall palette leans toward a delicate cyan-blue with low saturation, emphasizing fair, translucent skin. Subtle lens flare and dust motes in the air convey an effortless, warm, serene beauty.
Example 2 (fashion editorial + cinematic):
Dark moody fashion portrait style. The subject sits to one side of the frame, shot with a wide aperture so the background dissolves into soft bokeh. A precise, dramatic top light falls from an upper angle, illuminating only half of the face, the shoulder, and the arm, creating strong chiaroscuro contrast. The expression is calm and detached, the eyes gazing straight into the lens, full of story. The environment is rendered in deep green or dark blue tones; against the dark backdrop the skin looks finely textured, with crisp, sharp highlights. Fine cinematic film grain lends a premium, mysterious, tranquil atmosphere.
prompts.author: YanAI

prompts.title: 3D Cutie Style
prompts.author: YanAI

prompts.title: Xiaohongshu-Style Poster
prompts.description: Ask for parameters first + output poster JSON
prompts.prompt:
You are a professional visual prompt design assistant who helps users generate "Xiaohongshu-style" image prompts. Strictly follow this workflow:

Step 1: First ask the user the following questions and record the answers (any language is fine):
1. Do you want a vertical or horizontal poster layout? (vertical or horizontal)
2. What is the poster's subject area? For example: city travel, food exploration, natural scenery, weekend strolls.
3. Which collage style do you prefer? For example: journal style, sticker style, magazine feel, collage style.
4. Which border or label color do you prefer? For example: pink, bright yellow, grass green, sky blue.
5. What is the usage date range for this image? For example: 3.25 ~ 5.15.

Step 2: Fill in the template below based on the user's input and output the complete JSON.
- If the layout is vertical, set "aspect_ratio" to "3:4".
- If the layout is horizontal, set "aspect_ratio" to "4:3".
- Output only the JSON, with no extra explanation.

Template (replace the content inside curly braces):

{
  "prompt": "A vibrant and playful collage-style poster in a {orientation} layout, themed around {content_area}, featuring a mix of photos, stickers, and hand-drawn elements. The design includes cut-out photos of relevant scenes, speech bubbles, and colorful labels with border colors in {label_color}. The style resembles social media visuals from Xiaohongshu, with a {collage_style} look. Includes both Chinese and English text, such as a Chinese headline meaning 'City Explorer Program' and 'City Guide'.",
  "style": "{collage_style}, pastel color palette, vibrant and cheerful",
  "elements": [
    "speech bubbles",
    "hand-drawn arrows",
    "photo-style stickers (relevant to {content_area})",
    "gradient background",
    "Chinese and English text mixed"
  ],
  "color_scheme": "pastel colors (green, pink, yellow, sky blue, plus {label_color})",
  "composition": "center-aligned main title, scattered photos with decorative borders, dynamic and asymmetrical layout",
  "aspect_ratio": "{aspect_ratio}",
  "additional_notes": "Designed like a Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) campaign poster, aimed at a young, urban audience exploring {content_area} from {start_date} to {end_date}."
}
prompts.author: YanAI

prompts.title: Handwritten Notes Style
prompts.prompt:
Create concise, visually structured notes on the topic "{{topic}}". Notes must fit clearly within a {{orientation}} layout (horizontal/vertical), featuring:

- Moderate Font Size: Comfortable readability.
- Clear Structure:
  - Main points highlighted with "background colors" or "wavy underlines~".
  - Regular notes in standard ink.
  - Emphasis notes in a different ink color.
- Illustrations:
  - Include relevant sketches or hand-drawn style illustrations.
  - Allow fountain pen-style doodles or annotations directly on illustrations.
- Annotations:
  - Simulate notes, corrections, and additional quirky doodles resembling spontaneous annotations, using marker pen style.
  - Incorporate collage-style photo extracts relevant to the topic, annotated or doodled upon.
- Language Text Accuracy Constraint (Strict):
   - When generating text in "{{language}}", abide by recognized dictionaries and standard grammar rules.
   - For languages like Chinese or others with complex scripts:
     - Ensure each character or symbol is correct, standard, and used appropriately.
     - Double-check stroke order, avoid non-existent variants, and verify usage before finalizing the notes.

User Settings (to be defined before image generation):
- Topic: User-defined.
- Orientation: Horizontal or Vertical.
- Language: English/Chinese or any chosen language.
- Color Scheme: Main notes, emphasis notes, highlight style.
- Illustration Style: Detailed hand-drawn, minimalist sketches, or annotated magazine/photo cut-outs.

Once parameters are set, generate notes in the chosen language adhering strictly to the selected formatting and visual guidelines.
prompts.author: YanAI

prompts.title: Photo Quality Enhancement
prompts.description: Exposure and color + overall clarity boost
prompts.prompt:
Please perform professional photographic post-processing on the uploaded photo, so it looks as if the original photo had been captured with a better camera, a better lens, and steadier post-production.

Keep the original subject, the person's identity, the scene content, composition, clothing, pose, and background unchanged. Do not add people or objects, do not replace the background, and do not change the photo's meaning.

Focus areas:
1. Correct the exposure, white balance, color temperature, and color casts so the subject is clearer and the colors more natural.
2. Enhance local clarity, micro-contrast, and material detail, preserving the real textures of skin, hair, fabric, architecture, plants, and so on.
3. Reduce noise, compression artifacts, blur, and haze, without causing smearing, fake sharpening, or edge halos.
4. Recover highlight and shadow gradation; avoid blown-out whites, crushed blacks, and unnatural HDR.
5. Apply natural, photographic-grade color grading: clean, translucent, realistic, and textured — no heavy filters.

Output: realistic photo enhancement, high definition, natural colors, clear details, rich tonal range. Strictly avoid: AI look, illustration look, background replacement, identity changes, facial distortion, over-sharpening, oversaturation, painterly effect, plastic skin.
prompts.author: YanAI

prompts.title: Low-Light & Backlight Fix
prompts.description: Natural fill light + highlight and shadow recovery
prompts.prompt:
Please fix this dark, backlit, or unevenly exposed photo so the subject is clearer, while preserving the genuine ambience of the scene.

Keep the person's identity, facial structure, base skin tone, clothing, background, pose, and composition unchanged. Do not reshape the face, do not replace the scene, and do not add lighting effects that were not in the original image.

Focus areas:
1. Brighten the face and subject area and recover shadow detail so the face becomes naturally visible.
2. Pull back blown-out highlights, preserving detail and gradation in areas such as the sky, windows, lights, and skin highlights.
3. Balance warm and cool color temperature; correct yellow, green, or blue casts and color shifts caused by phone night modes.
4. Reduce shadow noise and compression grain while preserving the texture of the skin, hair, clothing, and background.
5. Make the overall light and shadow softer and more natural, like a real photo restored through professional photographic post-processing.

Output: natural fill light, realistic exposure, clear subject, rich tonal range, photographic quality. Strictly avoid: washed-out grayish brightness, heavy HDR, waxy faces, distorted skin tones, forced sky replacement, added lens flare, altering the original scene.
prompts.author: YanAI

prompts.title: HD Detail Restoration
prompts.description: Deblur and denoise + preserve real texture
prompts.prompt:
Please perform HD detail restoration and light deblurring on the uploaded photo, making it clearer and cleaner while still looking like the same real photo.

Strictly preserve the original person's identity, facial proportions, feature shapes, apparent age, hairstyle, clothing, scene, and composition. Do not change the expression, do not replace the background, and do not repaint the photo into an illustration or portrait template.

Focus areas:
1. Increase the overall resolution and edge clarity, fixing slight blur caused by hand shake, missed focus, or compression.
2. Restore real details: eye highlights, eyelashes, eyebrows, hair strands, skin texture, fabric texture, and background materials.
3. Reduce noise, color blocking, mosaic artifacts, and compression marks, avoiding any smeared look.
4. Keep the natural grain and lens character; do not turn the details into fake textures.
5. Moderately improve the brightness, contrast, and color so the photo is crisp without being harsh.

Output: realistic HD restoration, natural sharpening, enhanced detail, the same photo only clearer. Strictly avoid: face swapping, redrawn facial features, fake pores, over-sharpened halos, AI illustration look, plastic skin, over-denoised smearing.
prompts.author: YanAI
